patterns: build123d scripts — no imports needed, AgentCAD pre-injects primitives
PART selector at top of each design script controls which part renders/exports
STLs land in design/output/ with descriptive names
Toybox usable bed: 68x78x88mm — every STL must fit
Verify with py design/cs2_verify.py (31 checks) and py design/cs30_verify.py (19 checks)
codebase.architecture: Parametric Python CAD project. build123d + bd_warehouse for wheel-head and CS2/CS30/photo_box parts. trimesh + manifold3d for original stand (build_woodstand.py). AgentCAD MCP provides visual feedback loop (render PNG after each script run). All geometry validated against Toybox 68x78x88mm bed.
